description_long: This object is a tall coconut palm tree with a slender, textured trunk that extends vertically and is topped with a dense, rounded crown of long, arching fronds. The fronds are composed of numerous narrow, pointed leaflets radiating outward, creating a lush, feathery canopy. The trunk displays a rough, ringed pattern typical of mature coconut palms, and the foliage transitions from darker green at the top to lighter, slightly yellowed tones near the base of the crown. No visible coconuts are present among the fronds, and the base of the trunk is clean and unobstructed. The overall appearance is that of a healthy, mature coconut palm, commonly found in tropical urban landscapes, parks, or along streets.
description: A tall coconut palm tree with a slender, ringed trunk and a dense, feathery crown of arching green fronds. The foliage is lush and the trunk is textured, typical of urban tropical plantings.
description_view_0: The palm tree is seen with its crown slightly angled, showing a full, rounded spread of fronds and a straight, textured trunk.
description_view_1: This view presents the palm tree directly from the front, highlighting the symmetrical arrangement of the fronds and the vertical alignment of the trunk.
description_view_2: The palm is viewed from a slight angle, revealing the curvature of the trunk and the layered density of the fronds.
description_view_3: A straight-on view of the palm tree, emphasizing the even distribution of fronds and the tall, upright trunk.
attribute_husk_pattern: No coconut husk is visible; the trunk has a rough, ringed texture, and the fronds display a fine, linear pattern of leaflets radiating outward.
attribute_proximity_to_palm_trees: The object itself is a palm tree; no additional palm trees are visible nearby.
